keyFeatures.en: Online printing services for custom products
keyFeatures.zh: 在线打印服务，提供定制产品

keyFeatures.en: Wide range of marketing materials and promotional products
keyFeatures.zh: 广泛的营销材料和促销产品

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for some products
weaknesses.zh: 某些产品的定制选项有限

targetAudience.en: Small businesses and individuals looking for custom printing solutions
targetAudience.zh: 寻求定制印刷解决方案的小企业和个人

positioning.en: VistaPrint positions itself as a one-stop-shop for custom printing needs
positioning.zh: VistaPrint 自定位为满足定制印刷需求的一站式解决方案
